data.title: As a developer, nesting depth and guard tests validate the new agent-based design pipeline
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update test-skill-nesting-depth.sh to validate that preplanning uses Agent tool (not Skill tool) for design work. Update test-sub-agent-guard.sh to remove design-wireframe from the guard check list (redirect stubs don't need guards). Update test-redirect-stubs.sh to include the new design-wireframe redirect. Update test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh if it references design-wireframe skill invocation patterns.
**Why**: The existing tests validate the old Skill-based architecture — they need to reflect the agent-based pattern to catch regressions.
**Scope**:
- IN: test-skill-nesting-depth.sh (update tests 4-6 for agent pattern); test-sub-agent-guard.sh (remove design-wireframe, add ui-designer if applicable); test-redirect-stubs.sh (add design-wireframe redirect); test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh (update if affected)
- OUT: Writing new test files; changes to test-validate-review-output.sh or tests/evals/evals.json (reference design-wireframe but for different purposes)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, test-skill-nesting-depth.sh validates that preplanning Step 6 uses Agent tool dispatch (not Skill tool invocation) for design work
  ← Satisfies: "The sprint → preplanning → design-wireframe nesting chain is eliminated" (test verification)
- When this story is complete, test-sub-agent-guard.sh correctly reflects which skills have guards and which don't
  ← Satisfies: "A new dso:ui-designer sub-agent handles design creation" (test verification)
- When this story is complete, test-redirect-stubs.sh includes the design-wireframe redirect
  ← Satisfies: Redirect stub correctness verification
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Existing test-skill-nesting-depth.sh has 6 tests — verify which remain valid vs. need replacement
- [Testing] test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh may need updates if it tests skill invocation patterns
